commit_message: docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-542

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Added qc.ts to the 'What belongs here' file inventory (new polaris qc resolve command file, previously undocumented).
Documented that validateQcRepairLoopGate() also accepts a valid operator resolution artifact for the current repair round as a trusted-outcome equivalent, cross-referencing src/qc/POLARIS.md.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Added qc to the top-level command groups list and noted polaris qc resolve's role in the finalize gate.
Updated the QC repair-loop gate bullet to mention the operator resolution artifact override path.

evidence_summary: Reviewed the sole completed child (POL-543: polaris qc resolve command + finalize gate acceptance of operator resolution artifacts). src/qc/POLARIS.md was already updated in the worker's own commit and accurately describes the new resolution artifact contract, so it was left unchanged. Found two real drift points: src/cli/POLARIS.md and src/cli/SUMMARY.md did not list the new qc.ts command file or the qc command group, and src/finalize/POLARIS.md and src/finalize/SUMMARY.md described validateQcRepairLoopGate()'s blocking conditions without mentioning the new resolution-artifact override path added in this cluster. All four files were updated with targeted, high-confidence corrections (no changelog-style additions) and committed as a single librarian commit (da97d0e). Root src/SUMMARY.md and src/qc/SUMMARY.md (does not exist) required no changes. No cognition notes were pending, no raw docs were candidates for ingestion/promotion, Medic did not run, and no broken links were found. No blockers. Nothing further required from the operator before finalize.
